Add Service Log
Firebase Setup Guide
  1. Go to Firebase Console.
  2. Create a new project (Disable Google Analytics for speed).
  3. Go to Build -> Firestore Database and click Create Database.
  4. Select Start in test mode and click Enable.
  5. In Project Settings (gear icon), choose the Web icon (</>) to register an app.
  6. Copy the apiKey and projectId shown in the config snippet.
  7. Paste them into the Settings card and click Connect & Sync.

Note: Sync is automatic once connected.
